data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a technician swap without the customer knowing. However, the evidence does not confirm that the customer is unaware of the technician swap, as it only describes the scenario where the dispatcher reassigns a technician. The lack of explicit confirmation that the customer does not receive any notification about the change indicates a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the customer is unaware of the technician swap.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add confirmation mechanism for technician swap notifications
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that no notification is sent to the customer when a technician is swapped.
